analyzerIncidentBeforeOutcomeAccess.failure: Array.map passed its index and source array to variadic path.resolve during prelaunch-receipt validation.
analyzerIncidentBeforeOutcomeAccess.oldArmsDisposition: Moved unread to a chmod-000 quarantine and forbidden as analyzer inputs.
analyzerIncidentBeforeOutcomeAccess.disposition: The protocol's analyzer-mutation rule required an identical same-lane rerun under a fresh receipt; no old result was reused.

gateDisposition.reason: Treatment never executed the candidate behavior because every canonical production route was falsely rejected by producer-side metadata validation.

rootCause.productionRouteContract: PathHelper initializes route[0] to the moving unit's current/base cell and appends travelled neighbors.
rootCause.producerBug: isValidatedMoveShotSummary initialized prior=fromCell and then required route[0] to be adjacent. For canonical routes route[0] equals fromCell, so the zero-distance first comparison rejected every move+shot.
rootCause.testGap: Synthetic comparator fixtures omitted the leading origin cell.
rootCause.analyzerDisposition: Analyzer v2 correctly failed closed. It did not cause the invalid producer flag.
rootCause.treatmentControlEquality: Both arms were identical because dominant remained false and treatment always returned the shipped decision. Their zero outcome delta is non-informative.

postOutcomeForensicsNotUsableForPromotio.purpose: Design and exposure diagnosis only; these values cannot qualify or promote the stopped candidate.
postOutcomeForensicsNotUsableForPromotio.interpretation: The geometry has enough opportunity exposure to justify a repaired new-candidate pilot, but no effect estimate exists because the behavior was never selected.

requirements: Normalize exactly one optional leading origin cell and require a nonempty adjacent travelled path ending at the declared destination.
Add canonical source-inclusive route regressions and malformed repeated-origin/nonadjacent regressions.
Serialize strict and shipped source/destination cells plus divisor-before proof fields so analyzer and producer validity can be recomputed equivalently.
Commit and push a new candidate and preregistration before generating fresh outcomes.
Freeze and publish a new analyzer and prelaunch receipt; never pool this stopped pilot.

limitations: The 2.5% raw Armageddon-decided rate is a cohort baseline observation, not a feature effect; treatment executed no screened-closer decisions.
This feature-specific experiment does not establish the requested global near-zero Armageddon rate.
No bounded/default-readiness or renderer-projectile claim is made.
